body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `RootSolvers` package from `0.2, 0.3` to `0.2, 0.3, 0.4`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for RootSolvers to 0.4, (keep existing compat)

body:
Update buildkite pipeline (longrun) to add explicit walltime-limit (1 day). 
Fix typo in clearsky longrun build.
title: Explicit specification of time limits for newly added jobs
